title: Suspicious Process: mimikatz.exe
description: Process 'mimikatz.exe' spawned on WORKSTATION-01. Command: mimikatz.exe sekurlsa::logonpasswords exit
recommended: Investigate parent process; check if process is expected.

title: Credential Dumping Detected
description: Credential dump activity via 'mimikatz.exe' on WORKSTATION-01. CMD: mimikatz.exe sekurlsa::logonpasswords exit
recommended: Immediate host isolation; full IR engagement; credential rotation.
auto_response: Kill process; isolate host; alert CISO.

title: Persistence Mechanism Detected
description: Modification to persistence location: hklm\software\microsoft\windows\currentversion\run\windowsupdate on WORKSTATION-01
recommended: Review registry key / startup file; check if change is authorized.
auto_response: Revert registry change; isolate host if unauthorized.

title: Lateral Movement — wmic.exe
description: 'wmic.exe' used on WORKSTATION-01 to reach 192.168.1.200. Possible lateral movement.
recommended: Verify if remote admin is authorized; review SMB/WMI logs.
